items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
modster/obsidian-plugin

items.content_html: An obsidian plugin that exploit a natural language processing engine to find potential events and sync them with iCalendar
items.title: Vaccarini-Lorenzo/MagicCalendar: An obsidian plugin that exploit a natural language processing engine to find potential events and sync them with iCalendar

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous "page" (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous "page" (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.

items.content_html: An Obsidian Plugin for Linking to AWS S3 Objects
items.title: RagedUnicorn/obsidian-plugin-s3-link: An Obsidian Plugin for Linking to AWS S3 Objects

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin to execute code in a note.
items.title: twibiral/obsidian-execute-code: Obsidian Plugin to execute code in a note.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.
items.title: platers/obsidian-linter: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that adds a no-op command.
items.title: chrisgrieser/obsidian-nothing: An Obsidian plugin that adds a no-op command.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-meta-bind-plugin: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.
web-lux/obsidian-plugin

items.content_html: ZettelFlow is a plugin for Obsidian that helps you to create and manage your notes in a Zettelkasten way.
items.title: RafaelGB/Obsidian-ZettelFlow: ZettelFlow is a plugin for Obsidian that helps you to create and manage your notes in a Zettelkasten way.

items.content_html: Review your daily notes on their anniversaries, like "what happened today last year"
items.title: Kageetai/obsidian-plugin-journal-review: Review your daily notes on their anniversaries, like "what happened today last year"
durch/cloud-atlas-obsidian-plugin

items.content_html: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).
items.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).

items.content_html: Obsidian Gamified PKM: Supercharge your knowledge management experience through gamification with this Obsidian plugin.
items.title: saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm: Obsidian Gamified PKM: Supercharge your knowledge management experience through gamification with this Obsidian plugin.

items.title: Josie1902/obsidian_plugin_test1: Tinkering with Obsdian Plugin Development

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian. Search and insert quotes from a source text as you type. This is great for reading a physical book or eReader while taking notes on a separate laptop or phone.
items.title: alangrainger/obsidian-air-quotes: Plugin for Obsidian. Search and insert quotes from a source text as you type. This is great for reading a physical book or eReader while taking notes on a separate laptop or phone.

items.content_html: Weaver is a useful Obsidian plugin that integrates ChatGPT/GPT-3 into your note-taking workflow. This plugin makes it easy to access AI-generated suggestions and insights within Obsidian, helping you improve your writing and brainstorming process.
items.title: vasilecampeanu/obsidian-weaver: Weaver is a useful Obsidian plugin that integrates ChatGPT/GPT-3 into your note-taking workflow. This plugin makes it easy to access AI-generated suggestions and insights within Obsidian, helping you improve your writing and brainstorming process.

items.content_html: An plugin which help you to automatically manage Obsidian.
items.title: edonyzpc/personal-assistant: An plugin which help you to automatically manage Obsidian.
